description: Arky Test Vectors Release - Level 1 coverage plus executable Level 2/3 algorithmic vectors and an end-to-end reference path

changes.description: Level 2/3 expansion: executable algorithmic vectors + end-to-end reference path
changes: Added Notary N2 vectors (4): Merkle root, odd-count padding, inclusion proof, negative bad-proof
Added Notary N3 vectors (3): finality depth max(), policy-floor violation, reorg remediation
Added Settler S2 vectors (2): idempotency key derivation, STOP_ON_FAILURE cascade
Added Settler S3 vectors (2): compensation verb map, XR state transitions
Made Canonicalization C1 vectors executable (recompute JCS bytes vs expect)
Added end-to-end reference path (TIM->anchor->kernel->decision->XR, cryptographically linked)
Verifier now executes algorithmic vectors and walks chain linkage; emits results.json

changes.description: Phase 1 vector implementation - Level 1 coverage across all core specs
changes: Added TIM T1 vectors (7 vectors): validation, signatures, CID, timestamps
Added Canonicalization C1 vectors (6 vectors): JCS key ordering, numbers, escaping
Added Kernel K1 vectors (10 vectors): parsing, threshold, range, identity rules
Added Notary N1 vectors (8 vectors): intake, witness, skew, rate limiting
Added Settlers S1 vectors (10 vectors): pay, refund, signal, control, slash verbs
Added Discovery D1 vectors (6 vectors): revocations, index, JWKS, services
Fixed corrupted attestation vectors
Created shared fixtures: keys, TIMs, rails, accounts
Restructured manifest format for consistency
breaking_changes: Discovery vectors renamed from d1-revocations-001 to d1-001 format
Attestation vectors reformatted with proper JSON structure

changes.description: Consolidated test vector structure with improved documentation
changes: Consolidated manifest.json files into manifests/ directory
Added comprehensive README.md with quick overview
Created examples/ directory with simplified explanations
Added testing-guide.md for developer workflow
Flattened discovery test vector organization
Removed redundant empty directories
Standardized manifest format across all suites

changes.description: Initial test vector release with basic structure
changes: Basic test vector structure
Manifest files in each suite
Initial discovery and attestation vectors

next_steps: Add TIM T2/T3 vectors for completeness and witnessing
Add Canonicalization C2/C3 vectors for CID and signature coverage
Add Kernel K2/K3 vectors for policy and conflict handling
Add Discovery D2/D3 vectors for descriptors and advanced features
Add Attestation AT2/AT3 vectors for chains and integration
